use_codes.desc: CONTROLLING OR PREVENTING POST-OPERATIVE INTRAOCULAR PRESSURE RISES ASSOCIATED WITH OPHTHALMIC LASER SURGICAL PROCEDURES

indications.text:
IOPIDINE 1% Ophthalmic Solution is indicated to control or prevent post-surgical elevations in
intraocular pressure that occur in patients after argon laser trabeculoplasty, argon laser iridotomy
or Nd:YAG posterior capsulotomy.
Reference ID: 4227849
This label may not be the latest approved by FDA....
